title: Nerissa 300 Pcs Wooden Cutlery Set Disposable Bamboo Eco Friendly 100 Percent All-Natural Birchwood Biodegradable for Picnic Party Celebrations - Forks, Knives, Spoons
features: ✔Package Includes－100 wooden forks, 100 wooden knives and 100 wooden spoons. The length is about 16cm/6 inch. These are excellent substitutes for plastic and are very suitable for parties and barbecues.
✔Premium－Made of all natural birch wood, safe and environmentally friendly, 100% biodegradable, you don't have to worry about damaging the environment at all, you can use it with confidence.

✔High Strength－The surface of wooden tableware is polished smooth, sturdy and durable, and not easy to break; the spoon is large and can collect a lot of food; the knife and fork are both sharp and can be used for a variety of food materials.
✔Application－Our disposable tableware is an ideal choice for weddings, parties, family gatherings, picnics, camping, barbecues, office gatherings, etc.
✔Note－Because of the long-time transportation, the tableware will smell of wood, don’t worry, this is normal, just leave it for a few hours.
description: Are you still worrying about cleaning the tableware after the party? Using this wooden tableware will help you save precious time and energy. It is 100% biodegradable and environmentally friendly! Specifications: Material: all natural birch Size: 16cm/6 inch Quantity: 300 Features: 1.Selected all natural birch wood production, safe and environmentally friendly, 100% biodegradable is an excellent substitute for plastic. 2.The wooden tableware is sturdy and durable, not easy to break; the edges are polished and smooth, the grip is comfortable, it is easy to cut meat and vegetables, and it is very convenient to use. 3.Whether you are serving desserts, birthday cakes, salads, grilled meats, delicious homemade meals or other things, these disposable wooden tableware are the number one choice. Package Included: 100 x wooden fork 100 x Wooden Knife 100 x wooden spoon Satisfactory Service: If you have any questions, please feel free to contact us, we will try our best to provide you with the best shopping experience.
